en: Lapang, are you home?
Yes, come on in.
Lapang, are you home?

ab: uniyan i ruma’ i Lapang! i Angis ku, kemuda ziyamaw? ku rengayaw lra nu muruma’ i Lapang.
ch: B:Lapang不在家耶!我是Angis，有什麼事嗎? 回來我會轉告Lapang。
en: Lapang is not at home. I am Angis. What can I do for you? I will let him know when he comes back.

ab: iniyan i i Lapang! i Angis ku, kemuda ziyamaw? ku rengayaw lra nu muruma’ i Lapang.
ch: B:Lapang不在家耶!我是Angis，有什麼事嗎? 回來我會轉告Lapang。
en: Lapang is not at home. I am Angis. What can I do for you? I will let him know when he comes back.
Who are you?

ab: imu, i Lapang zi i Angis mi, ’alra zi truwalray mi ziya!
ch: B:奶奶，我們是Lapang 和 Angis，幫我們開門!
en: Grandma, we are Lapang and Angis, please open the door for us.
Who is it?

ab: i Vuya ku, zuwa ku muzangiya kani Untay.
en: I am Vuya, I am here for Untay.
Grandma, I am here to see you.

ab: sawariyan u lra ’azi zuwa zi, sare’er ku lra kaninu.
ch: A:你好久沒來了，我好想念你。
en: You haven’t been here for a long time. I missed you so much.
Akim, I am here to play with you.

ab: ’alra zi usavak! sawariyan ku lra mengarangara kaninu.
en: Come on in! I have been waiting for you for a long time.

ab: talrami mekan ku sinalem na vurasi!
ch: A+:這是我種的地瓜，吃吃看!
en: This is the sweet potato I grow. Try it!

ab: talrami mekan ku sinalem na vunga.
ch: A:這是我種的地瓜，吃吃看!
en: This is the sweet potato I grow. Try it!
The sweet potato is so sweet.
The sweet potato is so sweet.

ab: alamu! atalram ziya mekan kananku sinalem na inaekan na vuwa’.
ch: A:過來!這是我種的水果，吃看看。
en: Come here! These are the fruits I grow. You should try it.

ab: tavu’ ini na inaekan na vuwa’ a.
en: The fruit tastes sweet.

ab: dalreu ini na inaekan na vuwa’ a.
en: The fruit tastes sweet.

ab: ’alra zi kayan! atalram ziya mekan kananku sinalem na kudumu na ’azi pinutremelan.
ch: A+:請坐! 這是我種的有機玉米吃看看!
en: Take a seat! You should try some organic corn that I grow.

ab: ’alra zi kayan! atalram ziya mekan kananku sinalem na kadumu na ’azi pinutremelan.
ch: A:請坐! 這是我種的有機玉米吃看看!
en: Take a seat! You should try some organic corn that I grow.
Wow! The corn tastes so sweet.
Wow! The corn tastes so sweet.
Do you want some oranges?

ab: ’azi ku karuwa mekan za ’asiru, mekana ku lra za linggo.
ch: B:我不能吃橘子，我吃蘋果就好。
en: I can’t eat oranges. I will have some apples instead.
Would you want some cookies?
Sure, I like it very much.

ab: kemulita ku za inaekan na vuwa’ veray kaninu.
en: Let me peel the fruit for you.

ab: lrayuwan, mi’enay ini na inaekan na vuwa’ a.
en: Thank you. This fruit is so juicy.

ab: lrayuwan, mizanum ini na inaekan na vuwa’ a.
en: Thank you. This fruit is so juicy.
I will bring you some water.
I will bring you some water.
Thank you.

ab: puwapuwa mekan, sazu ku inevel na irupan.
en: Enjoy yourself. I cooked a lot of dishes.

ch: B:嗚! 真的很香也好吃。
en: Oh! It smells good and looks delicious.
Enjoy yourself. There is a lot more.
I’ll make myself at home then.
Enjoy yourself. There are plenty here.

ab: sazu lra ku inekan, ’azi ku pakaekan lra.
ch: B:我吃了好多，不能再吃了。
en: I ate a lot and couldn’t eat any more.
